content.en:
The Unsullied Abyss, the River of Shadows.

Ye Tian entered from this Innocent Abyss and was immediately noticed by the Innocent Shadow Dragon.

The closest Innocent Shadow Dragon flew out of the Shadow River, and a terrifying aura filled the air, and it was an Innocent Shadow Dragon comparable to the Origin Middle Realm.

However, Ye Tian's current strength was not afraid of this Origin Middle Realm Innocent Shadow Dragon, whose strength was not too strong.

Of course, he didn't fight it, but quickly entered the Shadow River.

He needed to find an Unsullied Shadow Dragon from the Origin Realm before he could replicate it.

Thundered!!!!

One after another, the Innocent Shadow Dragon appeared, besieging Ye Tian one after another.

Then.

Ye Tian urged the treasure of the other side in his body, urged the golden body of the other side with all his strength, and performed the supreme technique of the other side, killing one after another innocent shadow dragons.

But immediately after, a top-notch Origin Middle Realm Innocent Shadow Dragon appeared, and a black claw instantly grabbed Ye Tian and crushed his body.

In this way, Ye Tian's replica body fell.

......

"What a terrifying Innocent Shadow Dragon, that Innocent Shadow Dragon's strength should be no less than that of the Lord of Qingyun, it will kill me in one move!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Fortunately, he had already seen a lot of Innocent Shadow Dragons from the Origin Realm, and he had killed some of them.

So, he could just choose a Pure Shadow Dragon to copy at random.

Of course, he wouldn't copy the Unsullied Shadow Dragon to break into the Shadow River now, and wait a while to do so.

After a while.

Ye Tian began to copy the Innocent Shadow Dragon, and soon a Peerless Shadow Dragon from the Origin Realm was copied.

After that, Ye Tian infiltrated the Shadow River as an innocent shadow dragon, but did not attract the attention of the innocent shadow dragon clan.

Of course.

He is also low-key enough, otherwise he will attract the attention of the Origin Upper Realm Innocent Shadow Dragon, and if he wants to check his identity, the identity of this copied body will naturally not withstand the investigation.

Shadow River Bottom.

Ye Tian's Innocent Shadow Dragon copied his body, and slowly searched for the Ruin God Gold here.

It didn't take long for him to sense the aura of the ruin god gold.

"Found it!"

He dug the mountains at the bottom of the river and found six pieces of ruin god gold, which were not much, but they were a good start.

Next, he kept looking for the ruin god gold, and finally found a large amount of ruin god gold.

On this day, he even found a small vein of ruin god gold, where there were at least thousands of ruin god gold.

But it's a pity that this is the lair of a powerful Origin Middle Realm Innocent Shadow Dragon, and it is definitely not possible to dig the Ruin God Gold here.

In desperation, he could only choose to give up.

Ye Tian didn't care, the ruin god gold in the Shadow River was indeed far beyond the Thousand Caves Snake Domain.

Therefore, as time passed, Ye Tian obtained more and more ruin god gold.

this day.

Ye Tian once again gathered 10,000 pieces of Ruin God Gold, and then set out to build the Eternal Ruin God Array again.

Wind Tooth Island.

Ye Tian once again built an Eternal Ruin Divine Array, and used this Eternal Ruins Divine Array to comprehend the rules of the Origin of the Other Shore within the Origin of the Land of Eternity.

In this way, one primeval epoch after another passed.

Ye Tian's other side of the origin rules slowly improved, and soon rose to the realm of sixty percent nine, and began to impact the seventy percent realm.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's other side origin rules finally broke the shackles and was promoted to the seventy percent realm.

At this time, he found that his other side origin had reached a certain extreme, and he could not improve a little more.

He didn't need to test to know that he had reached the extreme of the Origin Realm, and the Origin on the other side could not continue to improve, if he wanted to continue to improve, he could only break through the realm first.

Once the Eternal Ruins Divine Array was opened, it could not be closed, so he directly attacked the Origin Middle Realm here.

"If you want to break through to the Origin Middle Realm, you must make the Origin on the other side boil, I killed two Origin Black Whales before, and refined a lot of Origin Whale Oil, there should be hope to make the Origin on the other side boil and impact the Origin Middle Realm. "

Then, Ye Tian began to take out all the Origin Whale Oil and integrate it into the Origin on the other side.

Soon.

The other side of the origin in his body began to boil.

At this time, he needs to use the rules of the other side to stimulate the other side of the source, so that the other side of the source can complete the evolution and reach another level, and then the real breakthrough will be.

Rumble!!!

Seventy percent of the other side origin rules affect the other side of the origin, so that the boiling other side of the origin will soon begin to evolve.

Rumble!!!!

The rapid transformation of the Origin of the Other Shore has made the Origin of the Other Shore continue to skyrocket, and sweep through the whole body, making the strength of the body continue to become stronger.

After a long time, Ye Tian's cultivation stepped into the Origin Middle Realm.

At the same time, his Origin Will and Origin Origin have skyrocketed, and his strength has naturally increased many times.

Having stabilized the realm, he continued to comprehend the rules of the origin on the other side.

In short, the Eternal Ruins Divine Array can't be wasted!

Dozens of primeval epochs have passed, and the Eternal Ruins Divine Array has finally been scrapped.

......

Ye Tian walked out of the Eternal Ruins Divine Array, and one by one the Origin Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors looked over and found that Ye Tian was already in the Origin Middle Realm, and came over one by one to congratulate him.

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord for breaking through the Origin Middle Realm!"

Even the Lord of Qingyun came out to congratulate.

Although the Lord of Qingyun is the owner of Qingyun Island, Ye Tian is too demonic, and he does not regard Ye Tian as an ordinary member.

Now, in order to break through to the Origin Middle Realm, Ye Tianxiu has mastered the complete Golden Body on the other side and the Supreme Technique on the other side, and the Origin Rule Realm on the other side is relatively high, so he naturally treats him as a peer.

Of course, if you don't become the owner of the island, you can't enter the high-level circle of Fengya Island, and your status is naturally still a lot worse.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian went to test his other side of the origin, and it had already reached the level of 100,000.

The difference between the 20,000 origins on the other side and the 100,000 origins on the other side is not only five times, but also includes qualitative changes.

Under normal circumstances, a newly promoted Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor would be able to reach the level of forty or fifty thousand at most, while Ye Tian would directly reach the level of one hundred thousand Origin Origin of the other side, and this standard would be directly equivalent to the middle stage of the Origin Middle Realm, saving countless years of penance.

After becoming the Origin Middle Realm, Ye Tian's authority on Fengya Island was increased, and he was able to see more inheritance method knowledge.

For example, the inheritance of knowledge from the other side.

Before, although he was also able to learn some knowledge of the treasures of the other side, it was all relatively simple knowledge.

His cultivation is not high, his authority is not high, and it is impossible for Fengya Island to open all the inheritance to him!

Deep in the Library.

Ye Tian has gained more knowledge of the inheritance of the Treasure of the Other Shore, which is about the inheritance knowledge of the Treasure of the Other Shore that is now being promoted.

The treasure of the other side is made of the purple ruin crystal of the other side, and his treasure of the other side is the inferior treasure of the other side, which can be continuously upgraded in the later stage.

But the method of upgrading, he didn't know before.

But now, after reading the inheritance, he knows several ways to upgrade. ~
